name: shaddai-aura
description: AURA — a tiny, dependency-free token saver. Answers prompts from a local cache, saved skills, or deterministic compute so you call (and pay for) the LLM far less. Use it as a CLI, a library, or an MCP server for Claude / Cursor / Claude Code.

scripts.test: node aura-core.test.js && node validate-skill.test.js && node search-index.test.js && node learn-sessions.test.js && node ingest.test.js && node tool-cache.test.js && node context-compress.test.js && node mcp.test.js
scripts.bench: node benchmarks/run-benchmark.js && node benchmarks/tool-cache-benchmark.js && node benchmarks/context-compress-benchmark.js
